Affidavit 
To whomsoever concerned 
 
I, KORADA SATYANARAYANA, Father of Korada SaiKiran, declare that I am a 
resident at the address “Plot No. 76, SBI Colony, Balaji Nagar, Totapalem area,  
near Srinivasa College, near Abdul Kalam Park, Vizianagaram”. I hereby declare that 
I will bear all expenses for my son during his studies in Japan. 
 
My family includes the following people –  
1.​ Korada Satyanarayana (Self), Date of Birth: 21/02/1971, Age: 55 Y. 
2.​ Korada Venkata Lakshmi (Wife), Dat
